name: yachat
description: ЯЧат desktop messenger login and registration

scripts.build: npm run preflight:vercel && node scripts/build-vercel.cjs && node scripts/finalize-public-web.cjs
scripts.build:vercel: npm run preflight:vercel && node scripts/build-vercel.cjs && node scripts/finalize-public-web.cjs
scripts.start: npm run brand && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/start-electron.ps1
scripts.launch: npm run brand && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/launch-yachat.ps1
scripts.check: node --check scripts/vercel-preflight.cjs && node --check scripts/generate-brand-assets.cjs && node --check scripts/build-vercel.cjs && node --check scripts/finalize-public-web.cjs && node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check src/renderer/sw.js && npm run preflight:vercel
